description:
This quiz assesses knowledge of HTML5 semantic elements beyond basic tags like <div> and <span>, testing the ability to choose appropriate tags for structure and accessibility. It is moderately challenging, using a light‑hearted, encouraging tone that nudges learners to improve their markup skills. The quiz aims to gauge practical understanding and confidence in applying semantic HTML in real projects.
Topics: HTML5 semantic tags, Web accessibility, Document structure, Best practices for markup
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and anyone with basic HTML experience who wants to deepen their understanding of modern, semantic HTML.
